title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
summary: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.

title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
summary: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.

title: S&P’s Mobility Unit Selling $2 Billion of Notes Pre-Spinoff
summary: S&P Global Inc.’s mobility unit announced a $2 billion bond sale Tuesday ahead of its planned spinoff from the credit-rating company.

title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Angst
summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concern over accelerating inflation fueled a selloff in global debt markets.

title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $649M in a Day as Long-Term BTC Holders ‘Limit Downside Potential’
summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $648 million outflows Monday as long-term BTC holders continue to accumulate the cryptocurrency.

title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
summary: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

title: XRP Alliance debuts as Flare, D’CENT link hardware wallets to XRP yield vaults
summary: Flare and D'CENT launched an integration connecting hardware wallets to XRP yield vaults, with no new chain, wallet, or gas token required.

title: TD Cowen raises Strategy price target to $400, citing faster bitcoin accumulation and accretive deleveraging
summary: TD Cowen raised its Strategy MSTR price target to $400, noting accelerating BTC per share growth and $1.5B in accretive debt repurchases.

title: Xi told Trump that Putin might ‘regret’ invasion of Ukraine
summary: US president also suggested they should co-operate with Russian leader against the International Criminal Court

title: Putin and Xi to discuss huge gas project at China summit
summary: Talks on Power of Siberia 2 pipeline come just days after Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing
